name: User should register with all valid fields

steps.name: Click 'Candidate hunting for interesting job offers'
Click getByRole('link', { name: 'Candidate hunting for interesting job offers' })
Fill "Quas viriliter aureus beneficium adsidue antea nulla dicta." getByLabel('Achievements')
Fill "Clementia audio administratio hic comitatus cognatus voluptatum." getByLabel('Achievements / Key results')
Fill "Aggredior volup patior cohors." getByLabel('Expectations from work (optional)')
Assert header has 'Congrats, your Hunter profile is all set!' text
Assert 'Job experience' has 'Less than 1 year' text
Assert 'Achievements' has 'Clementia audio administratio hic comitatus cognatus voluptatum.' text
Assert 'Core technical skills' has 'DevOps,JavaScript,API testing,manual testing,Mobile testing' elements

Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[class*=ProfileInfo_item]').filter({ has: locator('[class*=ProfileInfo_itemTitle]').getByText('Core technical skills') }).locator('[class*=ProfileInfo_tagsContainer]').getByText('DevOps', { exact: true })

Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[class*=ProfileInfo_item]').filter({ has: locator('[class*=ProfileInfo_itemTitle]').getByText('Core technical skills') }).locator('[class*=ProfileInfo_tagsContainer]').getByText('JavaScript', { exact: true })

Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[class*=ProfileInfo_item]').filter({ has: locator('[class*=ProfileInfo_itemTitle]').getByText('Core technical skills') }).locator('[class*=ProfileInfo_tagsContainer]').getByText('API testing', { exact: true })

Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[class*=ProfileInfo_item]').filter({ has: locator('[class*=ProfileInfo_itemTitle]').getByText('Core technical skills') }).locator('[class*=ProfileInfo_tagsContainer]').getByText('manual testing', { exact: true })

Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[class*=ProfileInfo_item]').filter({ has: locator('[class*=ProfileInfo_itemTitle]').getByText('Core technical skills') }).locator('[class*=ProfileInfo_tagsContainer]').getByText('Mobile testing', { exact: true })
Assert 'Expectations' has 'Aggredior volup patior cohors.' text
Assert 'Previous job dates' has 'Jan 2024 - Jan 2025' text
Assert 'Previous job achievements' has 'Quas viriliter aureus beneficium adsidue antea nulla dicta.' text
